title: Joint Probability Distribution Flowchart
description: A flowchart illustrating the concepts, relationships, and calculations involved in joint probability distributions for discrete random variables.
relationships: Sample Space defines outcomes for X and Y
Joint PMF Table organizes P(X=x, Y=y)
Marginal Distributions calculated from row/column sums
Conditional Distributions derived from joint and marginal probabilities
Independence verified by comparing joint and marginal products
